_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run: a model that merges symptom burden + unpredictability into one span (missing the unpredictability code) and skips the understated adaptation line. ~P 0.83 / R 0.67. Replace via --live for a real number.

codings.codedText: Some mornings the pain is so bad I can't get out of bed
the doctors told me it was all in my head, so now I second-guess whether anything they say is true
A few friends just drifted away when I kept cancelling
I'm not the same person I was before the diagnosis, and I'm still working out who I am now
I never know which day it'll be
